DEFENDANTS MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE (PER EX PARTE ORDER 09-30-22)302
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Richard McGreevy, Esq. (415.775.4455) of Leach & McGreevy LLP for Plaintiff.
Kevin Kidwell, Esq. (415.278.9400; kkidwell@psalaw.net) of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussion held re timeliness of contest to tentative ruling.
Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE (PER EX PARTE ORDER 09-30-22):

DEFENDANT, IVAN BALARIN (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "BALARIN") MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF MARTIN WERNICK'S ATTENDANCE AT AN INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION ("IME) PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF CCP SECTION 2032.220 AND A SEPARATE MENTAL IME PURSUANT TO THE PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 2032.30 IS DENIED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF A DEMAND FOR A MEDICAL IME WAS SERVED ON AUGUST 26, 2022 WITH THE IME SCHEDULED FOR SEPTEMBER 30, 2022. PLAINTIFF SERVED ITS OBJECTION TO THE DEMAND ON SEPTEMBER 15, 2022 ON THE GROUND THAT DEFENDANT HAD FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTIONS 2032.310 & 2032.320. THIS OBJECTION WAS WITHOUT MERIT AS THERE IS NO REQUIREMENT IN SECTION 2032.220 THAT A PHYSICAL IME IS CONDITIONED ON THE REQUIREMENTS OF AN IME UNDER SECTION 2032.220. IN RESPONSE TO THIS REFUSAL, PLAINTIFF TOOK NO ACTION UNTIL IT FILED THIS MOTION ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2022 WITH THE TRIALPENDING ON OCTOBER 31, 2022. HOWEVER, CCP SECTION 2032.250 (a) REQUIRES THAT A MOTION TO COMPEL MUST BE ACCOMPANIED BY A MEET AND CONFER DECLARATION UNDER CCP SECCTION 2016.040. NO SUCH DECLARATION WAS FILED WHICH JUSTIFYS THE COURT IN DENYING THE MOTION.
(2) DEFENDANTS' NOTICE FOR A MENTAL IME PURSUANT TO 2032.310 FAILS TO SATISFY THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP SECTION 2032.310(b) AS SET OUT IN CARPENTER v. SUPERIOR COURT (2006) 141 CALAPP. 4TH 249. IN ADDITION DEFENDANT FAILED TO SUPPLY A MEET AND CONFER DECLARATION. THE ONLY ALLEGED MEET AND CONFER STATEMENT REFERS TO A COMMUNICATION WHICH PREDATES THE PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
